aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: High but slightly scattered

💼 Career: Kaam me urgency hogi, par clarity missing ho sakti hai

❤️ Love: Misunderstanding avoid karni hogi

💰 Money: Sudden expense aa sakta hai

🧘 Advice: Plan bana ke chalo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Speed bina direction waste hai
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Grounded aur composed

💼 Career: Stability tumhe advantage degi

❤️ Love: Comfort aur trust build hoga

💰 Money: Financial position stable rahegi

🧘 Advice: Thoda open-minded raho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Change ko accept karna growth hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Active aur communicative

💼 Career: Networking se ek naya door open hoga

❤️ Love: Light-hearted vibe bonding improve karegi

💰 Money: Small gain possible

🧘 Advice: Distraction control karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Focus hi real power hai

♋ Cancer
